seo.title: Automatic Pool Cover | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Protect your pool with a premium automatic cover system. Safety, heat retention, reduced maintenance, and elegant design. Get a free quote from Maxima Pools.
seo.ogDescription: Safety and convenience in one system. Motorized pool covers that protect, retain heat, and look elegant.

hero.subtitle: Protect your pool, enhance your backyard, and enjoy effortless operation with a motorized cover built for durability and elegance.

overview.paragraph1: An automatic pool cover is a motorized system that closes and seals your pool with the touch of a button. It provides safety, reduces maintenance, helps retain heat, and protects your pool from debris — all while maintaining a clean, elegant look.
overview.paragraph2: Maxima Pools works with premium Auto Cover systems that integrate discreetly into the pool structure, preserving the design of your backyard.

howItWorks.title: Press the Button
howItWorks.description: A single keyswitch or remote activates the motorized system.

howItWorks.title: Cover Glides Smoothly
howItWorks.description: The fabric rolls across the water surface on concealed under-track rails.

howItWorks.title: Pool is Sealed
howItWorks.description: Your pool is protected, insulated, and safe — in under 60 seconds.

benefits.title: Safety First
benefits.description: A sealed cover supports weight and prevents unsupervised access, giving you peace of mind for children and pets.

benefits.title: Heat Retention
benefits.description: Traps warmth overnight and extends your swim season by weeks — reducing heating costs significantly.

benefits.title: Less Maintenance
benefits.description: Keeps leaves, debris, and insects out of your pool, cutting cleaning time and chemical use in half.

benefits.title: One-Touch Operation
benefits.description: Open or close your pool in under a minute with the press of a button. Effortless daily use.

benefits.title: Elegant Design
benefits.description: Integrates discreetly into the pool structure, preserving the clean aesthetics of your backyard.

benefits.title: Built to Last
benefits.description: Heavy-duty materials and engineering designed for years of reliable, maintenance-free performance.

underTrack.paragraph: For a seamless, timeless design, the Under-Track application houses the auto cover inside a concealed track attached directly to the pool wall. This keeps the mechanism completely out of sight while maintaining high structural integrity.

specifications.title: Easy-Out Pulley Assembly
specifications.description: Quick-access pulleys can be serviced in minutes, reducing downtime and ensuring long-term reliability.

specifications.title: Universal Compatibility
specifications.description: Adapts to rectangular, freeform, and custom pool layouts with seamless integration into any construction style.

specifications.title: SmartMotion Diagnostics
specifications.description: Real-time monitoring of cover movement, tension, and motor performance with instant alerts.

specifications.title: Electric Drive Mechanism
specifications.description: High-efficiency motor delivers smooth, quiet, consistent operation for years of dependable use.

finalCta.paragraph: Talk to our team today and get a personalized quote. We'll help you choose the right system for your pool.
